recommendations.title: Poker Face
recommendations.overview: A yearly high-stakes poker game between childhood friends turns into chaos when the tech billionaire host unveils an elaborate scheme to seek revenge for the ways they've betrayed him over the years. But as his plans unfold, a group of thieves hatch

recommendations.title: The Greatest Beer Run Ever
recommendations.overview: Chickie wants to support his friends fighting in Vietnam, so he does something wild—personally bring them American beer. What starts as a well-meaning journey quickly changes Chickie's life and perspective.

recommendations.title: Prizefighter: The Life of Jem Belcher
recommendations.overview: At the turn of the 19th century, Pugilism was the sport of kings and a gifted young boxer fought his way to becoming champion of England.

recommendations.title: Man of Steel
recommendations.overview: A young boy learns that he has extraordinary powers and is not of this earth. As a young man, he journeys to discover where he came from and what he was sent here to do. But the hero in him must emerge if he is to save the world from annihilation and

recommendations.title: Proof
recommendations.overview: Martin, a young blind photographer, is divided between his friendship with restaurant worker Andy and the exclusive love that Celia—who is terribly jealous of this new friendship—has for him.

recommendations.title: Into the White
recommendations.overview: During World War II, enemy fighter pilots find themselves face to face after shooting down one another's planes over a desolate landscape. In order to survive, they must set aside the rules of war.

recommendations.title: The Minimalists: Less Is Now
recommendations.overview: They've built a movement out of minimalism. Longtime friends Joshua Fields Millburn and Ryan Nicodemus share how our lives can be better with less.

recommendations.title: WILL
recommendations.overview: Two young police officers find themselves torn between collaboration and resistance as they navigate the Nazi-occupied Antwerp during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Little Princess
recommendations.overview: A little girl goes in search of her father who is reported missing by the military during the Second Boer War.

recommendations.title: Little Odessa
